## Sources

- **`proxmox-setup--*`** — in-repo `docs/proxmox/setup/`; collaborative docs (may have

- **`proxy-orig--*`** — off-repo `/Users/ryan/Developer/homelab/Proxy/` (untracked in
  old Mac clone); hand-written originals, pre-collaboration. Weight these as the purer
  voice signal.
